rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes when concrete bounds or visible feature names are provided.
Use visible identifiers to define range assumptions and guarantees in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Formulate guarantees as boolean expressions linking visible variables to bounds or conditions.
Ensure AGREE annex blocks use valid AADL component scopes for assumptions and guarantees.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Declare range checks as boolean variables using 'eq' for clarity and reuse.
Use valid AADL component type scopes for output range guarantees.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type contracts.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in type-level AGREE contracts.
